---
title: "Longitudinal exploration of cars"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
library(corrplot)
library(scales)
library(ggthemes)
library(kableExtra)

current_dir <- getwd()
source(file.path(current_dir,"src","R","utils.R"))

library(yaml)
config <- yaml.load_file(file.path(current_dir, "config.yaml"))
data_dir <- config$paths$data_dir

years <- c(2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)

waves <- list()
for (year in years) {
  file_path <- file.path(data_dir, config$sheds_files[[as.character(year)]])
  wave_name <- as.character(year)
  waves[[wave_name]] <- read_clean_sheds(file_path)
}

all_ids <- waves %>%
  map_df(~ select(.x, id)) %>%
  pull(id) %>%
  unique()

cat("\nTotal unique IDs across all waves:", length(all_ids), "\n")

cat("\n=== Summary ===\n")
cat("Total respondents (all waves):", sum(map_int(waves, nrow)), "\n")
cat("Total unique IDs:", length(all_ids), "\n")
cat("Duplicate appearances:", sum(map_int(waves, nrow)) - length(all_ids), "\n")

id_counts <- waves %>%
  map_df(~ select(.x, id), .id = "wave") %>%
  count(id) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

cat("\nDistribution of appearances:\n")
print(table(id_counts$n))
```



EV ownership over time using md_708 and history building:
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(knitr)

md_708_summary <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(waves), function(wave_name) {
    df <- waves[[wave_name]]
    tibble(
      year              = as.integer(wave_name),
      n_total           = nrow(df),
      n_population      = if ("md_hhgr" %in% names(df)) sum(df$md_hhgr[df$mob2_1 >= 1 & df$mob2_1 < 90], na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      n_car_owners_md220 = if ("md_220" %in% names(df)) sum(as.numeric(df$md_220) >= 1 & as.numeric(df$md_220) < 90, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      n_ev_md708        = if ("md_708" %in% names(df)) sum(df$md_708 == 1, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      n_ev_missing      = if ("md_708" %in% names(df)) sum(is.na(df$md_708)) else NA_integer_,
      n_total_vehicles_md220 = if ("md_220" %in% names(df)) sum(as.numeric(df$md_220[as.numeric(df$md_220) >= 1 & as.numeric(df$md_220) < 90]), na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      ev_rate_md708     = n_ev_md708 / n_total,
      ev_rate_car_owners = n_ev_md708 / n_car_owners_md220,
      ev_rate_vehicles = n_ev_md708 / n_total_vehicles_md220
    )
  })
) %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2016, 2017, 2018,2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025))

md_708_summary %>%
  mutate(
    ev_rate_md708      = percent(ev_rate_md708,      accuracy = 0.01),
    ev_rate_car_owners = percent(ev_rate_car_owners, accuracy = 0.01),
    ev_rate_vehicles   = percent(ev_rate_vehicles,   accuracy = 0.01)
  ) %>%
  kable(
    col.names  = c("Year", "N Total", "N Pop.", "N Car Owners (md_220)",
                   "N EV (md_708)", "N Missing", "N Total Vehicles (md_220)",
                   "EV Rate (all)", "EV Rate (car owners)", "EV Rate (vehicles)"),
    align       = "r",
    format.args = list(big.mark = ",")
  ) %>%
  print()

stata_car_history <- build_car_history_stata(waves)


results_stata <- bind_rows(
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2016, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2017, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2018, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2019, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2020, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2021, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2023, waves),
  analyze_ev_ownership_data(stata_car_history, 2025, waves)
)

results_stata %>%
  select(year, n_total, n_car_owner_population, n_car_owners, n_ev_main, n_ev_secondary,
         n_ev_total, n_hybrid_gas, n_hybrid_diesel, ev_rate_car_owners, n_car_owners_inter, n_total_vehicles_md220, n_total_vehicles_mob2, ev_rate_vehicles, n_hybrid_total, n_elec_total) %>%
  # mutate(ev_rate_car_owners = percent(ev_rate_car_owners, accuracy = 0.01)) %>%
  mutate(
    ev_rate_car_owners = percent(ev_rate_car_owners, accuracy = 0.01),
    ev_rate_vehicles   = percent(ev_rate_vehicles,   accuracy = 0.01)
  ) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Year", "N", "Pop.", "Car Own.", "EV Main", "EV 2nd",
                  "EV Total", "Hybrid Gas", "Hybrid Dies.", "EV Rate car owners", "N car owners inter", "Total vehicles inter", "Total vehicles mob", "Ev rate vehicles", "Hybrid total", "Elec total"),
    align = "r",
    format.args = list(big.mark = ",")
  ) %>%
  print()
```


SHow stata car_history:
```{r}
print(stata_car_history)
```


Call api FSO:
```{r}
library(httr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

url <- "https://disseminate.stats.swiss/rest/data/CH1.MFZ_IVS,DF_MFZ_1_EMISSION,1.0.0/_T._T._T._T._T+PC+PH+DC+DH+HP+HD+EL+FC+GA+_O._T._T.A?startPeriod=2005&endPeriod=2025&dimensionAtObservation=AllDimensions&format=csvfilewithlabels"

resp <- GET(url)
cat("Status:", status_code(resp), "\n")

fso_raw <- read_csv(content(resp, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8"),
                    show_col_types = FALSE)

fso <- fso_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(TIME_PERIOD)) %>%
  select(FUEL = matches("(?i)fuel"), TIME_PERIOD, OBS_VALUE = matches("(?i)obs_value"))

print(fso)
names(fso_raw)

fso <- fso_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(TIME_PERIOD)) %>%
  select(fuel = Fuel, year = TIME_PERIOD, value = OBS_VALUE) %>%
  mutate(fuel_code = case_when(
    grepl("Total",                                    fuel, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "total",
    grepl("Battery electric|^Electric",               fuel, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "bev",
    grepl("plug-in hybrid.*petrol|PHEV.*petrol",      fuel, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "phev_petrol",
    grepl("plug-in hybrid.*diesel|PHEV.*diesel",      fuel, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "phev_diesel",
    grepl("hybrid electric.*petrol|petrol.*hybrid",   fuel, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "petrol_hev",
    grepl("hybrid electric.*diesel|diesel.*hybrid",   fuel, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "diesel_hev",
    grepl("Petrol: conventional",                     fuel, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "petrol",
    grepl("Diesel: conventional",                     fuel, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "diesel",
    TRUE ~ "other"
  )) %>%
  group_by(year, fuel_code) %>%
  summarise(value = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = fuel_code, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(
    phev         = coalesce(phev_petrol, 0) + coalesce(phev_diesel, 0),
    hev          = coalesce(petrol_hev,  0) + coalesce(diesel_hev,  0),
    total_hybrid = phev + hev,
    ev_pct       = (bev          / total) * 100,
    hybrid_pct   = (total_hybrid / total) * 100
  )
print(fso)
```

Prepare data to be compared with FSO vehicle stock:
```{r}
sheds_md708_pop <- md_708_summary %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  mutate(
    percentage = (n_ev_md708 / n_total_vehicles_md220) * 100,
    type       = "Pure Electric",
    source     = "SHEDS (md_708)"
  ) %>%
  select(year, type, percentage, source)


sheds_history_pop <- bind_rows(
  # 2019+ : separate elec and hybrid counts
  results_stata %>%
    filter(year %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
    select(year, n_elec_total, n_hybrid_total, n_total_vehicles_mob2) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(n_elec_total, n_hybrid_total),
                 names_to = "type", values_to = "count") %>%
    mutate(
      percentage = (count / n_total_vehicles_mob2) * 100,
      type       = recode(type,
                          "n_elec_total"   = "Pure Electric",
                          "n_hybrid_total" = "Hybrid"),
      source     = "SHEDS (History)"
    ),

  # 2016-2018: mixed EV+hybrid category
  results_stata %>%
    filter(year %in% c(2016, 2017, 2018)) %>%
    mutate(
      count      = n_ev_total,
      percentage = (n_ev_total / n_total_vehicles_mob2) * 100,
      type       = "EV+Hybrid (mixed)",
      source     = "SHEDS (History)"
    ) %>%
    select(year, type, count, n_total_vehicles_mob2, percentage, source)
) %>%
  mutate(
    source = factor(source, levels = c("FSO (Official)", "SHEDS (md_708)", "SHEDS (History)")),
    type   = factor(type,   levels = c("Hybrid", "Pure Electric", "EV+Hybrid (mixed)"))
  )

print(sheds_md708_pop)
print(sheds_history_pop)
```


New bfs file:
```{r}

fso_long <- fso %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  select(year, ev_pct, hybrid_pct) %>%
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "type", values_to = "percentage") %>%
  mutate(
    type   = recode(type, "ev_pct" = "Pure Electric", "hybrid_pct" = "Hybrid"),
    source = "FSO (Official)"
  )

# also extend md_708 to all years
md_708_summary <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(waves), function(wave_name) {
    df <- waves[[wave_name]]
    tibble(
      year                   = as.integer(wave_name),
      n_total                = nrow(df),
      n_car_owners_md220     = if ("md_220" %in% names(df)) sum(as.numeric(df$md_220) >= 1 & as.numeric(df$md_220) < 90, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      n_ev_md708             = if ("md_708" %in% names(df)) sum(df$md_708 == 1, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      n_total_vehicles_md220 = if ("md_220" %in% names(df)) sum(as.numeric(df$md_220[as.numeric(df$md_220) >= 1 & as.numeric(df$md_220) < 90]), na.rm = TRUE) else NA_integer_,
      ev_rate_md708          = n_ev_md708 / n_total,
      ev_rate_vehicles       = n_ev_md708 / n_total_vehicles_md220
    )
  })
)

sheds_md708_pop <- md_708_summary %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  mutate(
    percentage = (n_ev_md708 / n_total_vehicles_md220) * 100,
    type       = "Pure Electric",
    source     = "SHEDS (md_708)"
  ) %>%
  select(year, type, percentage, source)

comparison_data_2 <- bind_rows(fso_long, sheds_history_pop, sheds_md708_pop) %>%
  mutate(
    source = factor(source, levels = c("FSO (Official)", "SHEDS (History)", "SHEDS (md_708)")),
    type   = factor(type,   levels = c("Hybrid", "Pure Electric", "EV+Hybrid (mixed)"))
  )

comparison_totals_2 <- comparison_data_2 %>%
  group_by(year, source) %>%
  summarise(total_pct = sum(percentage), .groups = "drop")

p_comparison <- comparison_data_2 %>%
  left_join(comparison_totals_2, by = c("year", "source")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = source, y = percentage, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3.5, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(y = total_pct, label = sprintf("%.1f%%", total_pct)),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Hybrid"            = "#FF9800",
    "Pure Electric"     = "#1B5E20",
    "EV+Hybrid (mixed)" = "#66BB6A"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(comparison_totals_2$total_pct) * 1.15),
    breaks = seq(0, 25, 2),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Percentage of total vehicles (%)", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y       = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 9, angle = 15, hjust = 1),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )

print(p_comparison)
save_plot(p_comparison, "bfs_vs_sheds_comparison_with_md708", width = 16, height = 10)
```


Without md_708:
```{r}

fso_long <- fso %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)) %>%
  select(year, ev_pct, hybrid_pct) %>%
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "type", values_to = "percentage") %>%
  mutate(
    type   = recode(type, "ev_pct" = "Pure Electric", "hybrid_pct" = "Hybrid"),
    source = "FSO (Official)"
  )

comparison_data_2 <- bind_rows(fso_long, sheds_history_pop) %>%
  mutate(
    source = factor(source, levels = c("FSO (Official)", "SHEDS (History)")),
    type   = factor(type,   levels = c("Hybrid", "Pure Electric", "EV+Hybrid (mixed)"))
  )

comparison_totals_2 <- comparison_data_2 %>%
  group_by(year, source) %>%
  summarise(total_pct = sum(percentage), .groups = "drop")

p_comparison <- comparison_data_2 %>%
  left_join(comparison_totals_2, by = c("year", "source")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = source, y = percentage, fill = type)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", percentage)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size = 3.5, color = "white", fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(aes(y = total_pct, label = sprintf("%.1f%%", total_pct)),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Hybrid"            = "#FF9800",
    "Pure Electric"     = "#1B5E20",
    "EV+Hybrid (mixed)" = "#66BB6A"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, max(comparison_totals_2$total_pct) * 1.15),
    breaks = seq(0, 25, 2),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ year, nrow = 1) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Percentage of total vehicles (%)", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y       = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 9, angle = 15, hjust = 1),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )

print(p_comparison)
save_plot(p_comparison, "bfs_vs_sheds_comparison_without_md708", width = 24, height = 6)
```
